feature: Ghost Mode Hardening + Full Telegram Dev Parity + Local Models

tasks.title: NLP natural language routing for telegram-dispatch.md
tasks.description: Upgrade telegram-dispatch.md with NLP intent detection — 'build X' auto-routes to /ghost, 'fix X' to /debug, always-autonomous default.
acceptance_criteria: Natural language messages are classified by intent (BUILD, FIX, TEST, REVIEW, SHIP, etc.)
BUILD/PLAN intents route to /ghost (always-autonomous)
FIX intents route to /debug
High-confidence matches dispatch immediately, medium-confidence asks for confirmation
No-match falls back to conversational mode
Queue entries include nlp_routed flag
Prompt injection guard documented for NLP-extracted arguments

tasks.title: Auto quality gate hook
tasks.description: Create hooks/auto-quality-gate.sh for auto lint+typecheck on code changes.
acceptance_criteria: Triggers on Edit/Write tool for .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx/.py files
Runs ESLint or Biome for JS/TS projects
Runs tsc --noEmit for TypeScript files
Runs ruff and mypy for Python files
Reports failures with formatted output
Script is executable

tasks.title: Telemetry hook
tasks.description: Create hooks/telemetry.sh for observability logging of all tool calls.
acceptance_criteria: Logs structured JSON events to ~/.claude/logs/telemetry.jsonl
Captures tool name, type, file path, project, branch, session
Classifies tools into types (read/write/exec/agent/mcp)
Auto-rotates log at 10MB
Script is executable

tasks.title: Alert check hook with 4 mandatory alerts
tasks.description: Create hooks/alert-check.sh with 4 alerts: test failure, build failure, disk low, timeout warning.
acceptance_criteria: Alert 1: Test suite failure detection (pytest, vitest, jest)
Alert 2: Build/compile failure detection (tsc, cargo, go)
Alert 3: Disk space low (>90%) with 1h dedup
Alert 4: Ghost Mode timeout (exceeds max_hours)
All alerts log to ~/.claude/logs/alerts.jsonl
Alerts dispatch via ghost-notify.sh
Script is executable

tasks.title: 5 integration tests
tasks.description: Create 5 integration tests in tests/integration/ covering hooks, config, dispatch security, notifications, and VPS setup.
acceptance_criteria: test-hooks-exist.sh: verifies all hooks exist and are executable (15 checks)
test-config-valid.sh: validates all JSON configs parse correctly (12 checks)
test-dispatch-runner.sh: tests security validation rejects bad inputs (7 checks)
test-ghost-notify.sh: tests all notification levels exit cleanly (8 checks)
test-setup-vps-flags.sh: tests --with-ollama and other flags in dry-run (10 checks)
All 52 assertions pass

tasks.title: Ollama local model support
tasks.description: Create config/model-routing.json and update setup-vps.sh with --with-ollama flag.
acceptance_criteria: model-routing.json defines providers (anthropic, ollama) with model mappings
Routing rules map task types (planning, implementation, review, testing, triage) to models
Fallback policy triggers on API errors or budget exceeded
Offline mode support documented
setup-vps.sh accepts --with-ollama flag
Phase 9/10 installs Ollama, pulls base model, copies config
Phase count updated from 9 to 10 across all phases

tasks.title: Observability dashboard command
tasks.description: Create commands/dashboard.md for unified observability view.
acceptance_criteria: Aggregates data from telemetry, alerts, tasks, queue, ghost-config, metrics
Computes tool usage breakdown, alert counts, task progress
Runs system health checks (disk, sessions, Ollama, budget)
Full terminal dashboard with box-drawing characters
Condensed Telegram version within 4096-char limit
Gracefully handles missing data sources

tasks.title: Extend test-after-impl.sh for all source files
tasks.description: Upgrade test-after-impl.sh to trigger on source file changes, not just test files.
acceptance_criteria: Triggers on .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx/.py/.go/.rs files
For test files: runs that specific test (existing behavior)
For source files: finds corresponding test file using 6 search patterns
Supports co-located tests, __tests__ dirs, tests/ dir, Python test_ prefix
Silently skips if no corresponding test found
Reports which source file triggered the test run

tasks.title: Update AGENTS.md for Sprint 6
tasks.description: Add Sprint 6 sections to AGENTS.md covering hardening, NLP dispatch, and local models.
acceptance_criteria: Sprint 6 section documents NLP dispatch routing
Documents new hooks (auto-quality-gate, telemetry, alert-check)
Documents model-routing.json and Ollama support
Documents dashboard command
Documents test-after-impl.sh source file triggering
